title: Soartex FanverStyleGui
description: For using the sortexfanver-style GUI in the new version
body:
As we know, Minecraft 1.20+ Mojang changed the GUI sprites,
so older texture packs' GUIs usually do not work with it. 
Then I made the Soartex Fanver GUI texture pack.

Use with originalpacks:
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/soartex-fanver-vanilla
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/grove-vanilla

Compatible with new version GUIs. Report any issues.
Only for version 1.21.8 - may work on other versions but could have problems.
Feedback welcome. Pull requests accepted:
https://github.com/Muruaaki/SoartexFanverGUI
